description: Detects duplicate function bodies and duplicate switch case arms in C++. Simplified from Rust: uses select:symbol to flag all functions, without rolling-hash body comparison or switch-case duplicate detection. No cross-function similarity detection in JSON DSL. Precision reduced -- all functions are flagged regardless of body similarity.

flag.message: Function/method detected -- review for duplicate implementations; identical or near-identical function bodies should be refactored into shared utilities
